description: Epic, multi-step or multi-day challenges with strict safety boundaries. Nightmare measures commitment, not danger.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Movement Mosaic
challenges.prompt: For seven days, complete 20 to 30 minutes of comfortable movement, choosing at least four different activity types and including easier recovery days.

challenges.title: Five-Day Walk-and-Create
challenges.prompt: For five days, take a safe 20-minute walk and make one small drawing, photo, or paragraph inspired by it; never use a device while moving.

challenges.title: Epic Team Challenge Day
challenges.prompt: Organize a two-hour team event with six safe stations: walking relay, charades, puzzle, cup stack, drawing, and trivia; inspect the venue and make every station optional.

challenges.title: Three-Hour Marked-Trail Quest
challenges.prompt: Only if it matches the group's current ability, complete up to three hours on a legal marked route with capable companions, route sharing, weather checks, water, food, daylight margin, and a turn-back plan.

challenges.title: Two-Hour Protected Bike Quest
challenges.prompt: Experienced riders only: plan a legal protected or low-traffic route, wear helmets, carry repair basics and water, ride with a capable buddy, obey traffic law, and turn back for weather or fatigue.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Mobility Habit
challenges.prompt: For seven days, do 10 to 15 minutes of gentle, familiar mobility without bouncing or pushing into pain; stop any movement that causes symptoms.

challenges.title: Five-Day Dance Build
challenges.prompt: Over five days, safely learn and rehearse a three-minute dance, using rest days or reduced practice whenever your body needs them.

challenges.title: Personal Activity Bingo
challenges.prompt: Create a 5-by-5 board of safe, adaptable movement tasks and complete a line over seven days; no square may require pain, exhaustion, or public embarrassment.

challenges.title: Buddy Distance Project
challenges.prompt: With a willing buddy, choose a cumulative walking distance appropriate to both of your current abilities and reach it across seven days with safe routes and full rest as needed.

challenges.title: Design an Accessible Workout Game
challenges.prompt: Create, test, and document a 30-minute movement game with seated, low-impact, and higher-energy options; get feedback from willing testers.

challenges.title: Seven-Episode Micro-Series
challenges.prompt: Write, shoot, and edit seven connected 30-second original episodes over seven days; everyone filmed controls whether and where footage is shared.

challenges.title: Ten-Minute Stage Show
challenges.prompt: Create and perform a ten-minute clean variety show containing at least three original segments for an audience that opted in.

challenges.title: Illustrated Short Book
challenges.prompt: Write, illustrate, revise, and assemble an original story of at least twelve pages.

challenges.title: Cardboard City Build
challenges.prompt: Design and build a tabletop cardboard city with at least ten structures using age-appropriate tools, then recycle or store all materials responsibly.

challenges.title: Original EP Challenge
challenges.prompt: Write and record three short original songs using only sounds you created or have permission to use.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Photo Alphabet
challenges.prompt: Across seven days, create 26 original photos representing A through Z without trespassing or including unconsented people or private information.

challenges.title: Five-Minute Stop-Motion
challenges.prompt: Plan and produce a five-minute stop-motion film with an original story, legally usable audio, and a clear workspace.

challenges.title: Build a Board Game
challenges.prompt: Design, prototype, play-test, revise, and document an original tabletop game using safe materials and willing testers.

challenges.title: Room-Sized Art Installation
challenges.prompt: With property-owner permission, create a temporary walk-safe art installation, invite willing viewers, then remove it completely and restore the space.

challenges.title: Mini Documentary
challenges.prompt: Research, record, and edit a five-minute documentary about a harmless local topic using verified facts and explicit recording/location permissions.

challenges.title: Ask and Plan a Respectful Date
challenges.prompt: Privately ask an age-appropriate person you already know on a specific public date, accept any answer immediately, and—only after a clear yes—plan details that respect both people's boundaries, budget, transport, and schedule.

challenges.title: Host a Five-Person Gathering
challenges.prompt: Invite at least five people you know to a two-hour inclusive activity with clear details, an easy decline, accessible options, and no surprise costs or recording.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Reconnection Project
challenges.prompt: Contact one trusted friend or relative each day with an individualized, no-pressure message or call request; never repeatedly contact someone who does not respond.

challenges.title: Community Event Courage
challenges.prompt: Attend a legitimate public class, club, or volunteer event with a buddy, participate appropriately, and introduce yourself to three peers while respecting disengagement cues.

challenges.title: Open-Mic Original
challenges.prompt: With guardian approval where needed, register for a legitimate all-ages or age-appropriate open mic and perform an original clean piece; follow venue rules and never record others without permission.

challenges.title: Plan a Surprise That Is Not a Trap
challenges.prompt: Create a positive surprise for someone you know while confirming their boundaries through a trusted person; no public spectacle, fear, deception about emergencies, unwanted guests, or forced recording.

challenges.title: Seven Honest Conversations
challenges.prompt: Across seven days, have seven short, respectful conversations with people you already know, listening more than you speak and avoiding pressured personal topics.

challenges.title: Create a Friend-Group Time Capsule
challenges.prompt: With willing friends, collect copies of non-sensitive notes or art, agree on storage and an opening date, and let every contributor remove their item at any time.

challenges.title: Run a Consent-First Game Night
challenges.prompt: Host a game night where rules, photos, food, teams, and participation are opt-in; provide quiet alternatives and allow anyone to leave without explanation.

challenges.title: Learn Five People's Stories
challenges.prompt: Ask five willing people you already know one open question about a positive memory or interest, listen, and keep their answers private unless they permit sharing.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Kindness Portfolio
challenges.prompt: Complete and privately document seven consent-respecting acts of service or appreciation; never film recipients or use kindness to demand attention.

challenges.title: Volunteer Project Shift
challenges.prompt: Complete a half-day project through a reputable organization, including required orientation, guardian approval, protective equipment, and confidentiality.

challenges.title: Organize a Small Donation Drive
challenges.prompt: With a legitimate recipient organization and venue permission, collect only items they currently request, publish accurate rules, protect donor privacy, and deliver everything as promised.

challenges.title: Build a Free Resource Website
challenges.prompt: Create a simple accessible site listing verified free community resources using official public contact information; add a date checked and avoid collecting user data.

challenges.title: Neighborhood Cleanup Team
challenges.prompt: Join or obtain permission for a group cleanup, brief everyone on traffic and hazardous-waste avoidance, use protective gear, and dispose of ordinary litter correctly.

challenges.title: Three Meaningful Repairs
challenges.prompt: Over a week, safely mend three appropriate items for yourself or willing people; use correct tools and exclude electrical, gas, vehicle, structural, medical, and protective equipment.

challenges.title: Cook a Family Meal Event
challenges.prompt: With kitchen and household permission, plan, budget, cook, serve, and clean up a full meal for willing guests while managing allergies, cross-contamination, appliance safety, and supervision.

challenges.title: One-Week Language Sprint
challenges.prompt: Study a language for 30 focused minutes on seven days, covering listening, speaking, reading, and writing, then record a private progress check.

challenges.title: Build and Explain an App
challenges.prompt: Create a small original application with data storage or an API, tests for its core behavior, setup instructions, and a three-minute demo.

challenges.title: Learn a Full Beginner Routine
challenges.prompt: Learn a complete safe beginner routine in juggling, magic, drawing, music, or another low-risk skill and perform or display it for willing friends.

challenges.title: Read-and-Teach Project
challenges.prompt: Read a short nonfiction book or 150 pages across seven days, verify three key claims with reputable sources, and teach a five-minute summary to a willing listener.

challenges.title: Hundred-Piece Maker Project
challenges.prompt: Create one object or artwork involving at least 100 safe assembled pieces, documenting the design and cleaning the workspace afterward.

challenges.title: Local History Quest
challenges.prompt: Using libraries, museums, or official archives, research a local place and produce a sourced two-page story without entering restricted sites or exposing private addresses.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Digital Reset
challenges.prompt: Back up important files, then spend 30 minutes daily organizing only your own files, photos, messages, and accounts; never delete records needed for school, work, finance, health, or safety.

challenges.title: Finish-One-Project Week
challenges.prompt: Choose one safe unfinished personal project, define a realistic done state, complete daily focus blocks for seven days, and stop scope from expanding.

challenges.title: Personal Space Overhaul
challenges.prompt: Plan and complete a full reset of your own room across several sessions, preserving documents, medication, valuables, emergency access, and everyone else's belongings.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Optional-Feed Break
challenges.prompt: Avoid optional algorithmic social feeds for seven days while keeping necessary communication, accessibility tools, maps, school/work access, news alerts, and emergency services.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Sleep-Protecting Wind-Down
challenges.prompt: For seven nights, reserve the last 30 minutes before your normal bedtime for a calm screen-light activity without reducing your usual sleep time.

challenges.title: Seven-Day Creative Morning
challenges.prompt: Within your normal waking schedule, spend 20 minutes creating before optional scrolling on seven days; do not wake earlier or sacrifice sleep.

challenges.title: Design the Next Fifty Challenges
challenges.prompt: Write 50 original, legal, consent-respecting, accessible challenge ideas; safety-review each one against the project's prohibited-content policy before proposing them.
